## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (under the current top version heading pre-release, or `## [Unreleased]` after; skip for internal-only refactors)
- [ ] If this touches the airport/FIR database: ran `scripts/generate_airports.py` (or explained why not) — see `scripts/README.md`
